title: Repair a topology-aware project so its local world resolves
goal: Fix the topology/config setup so local world inspection succeeds again.
initialPrompt: A topology-aware project no longer resolves its local runtime world. Fix the project so `sigil inspect world --env local .` succeeds again. Keep the change focused on the topology/config definitions.
successCriteria: World inspection for env local succeeds.
The patch stays within topology/config files.
